focus: correctness finer grain: seeded-PPR deadline duplicate trace behavior; initial checklist evidence replay

findingsNew.title: Seeded-PPR trace output loses the multi-hop provenance chain
findingsNew.claim: When SPECKIT_CODE_GRAPH_SEEDED_PPR_RANKING and includeTrace are both enabled, multi-hop impact candidates are returned with depth from PPR, but why_included.edgeChain records only the candidate's final incoming edge, not the full path back to the anchor.
findingsNew.counterevidenceSought: Checked whether WeightedWalkResult carries predecessor/path data and whether recovered PPR tests cover includeTrace for multi-hop ranking; neither was present.
findingsNew.alternativeExplanation: edgeChain may be intended as a set of contributing edges rather than an ordered path, but a single final edge cannot explain depth greater than 1 for a PPR candidate.
findingsNew.downgradeTrigger: Downgrade if the trace contract documents seeded-PPR as single-edge-only or if downstream consumers ignore why_included for PPR impact mode.

findingsNew.title: Checklist completion evidence conflicts with the packet's own task state
findingsNew.claim: checklist.md declares all verification buckets complete, including P1 Items 10/10, while tasks.md and plan.md still leave live sync, packet doc updates, strict validation, and overall completion criteria unchecked.
findingsNew.counterevidenceSought: Replayed strict spec validation, code-graph typecheck, and targeted seeded-PPR vitest commands; they pass, but passing commands do not reconcile the contradictory completion state across packet docs.
findingsNew.alternativeExplanation: tasks.md and plan.md may be stale while checklist.md is current, which is still a traceability defect because packet source-of-truth docs contradict completion evidence.
findingsNew.downgradeTrigger: Downgrade after tasks.md/plan.md/checklist.md are reconciled to one completion state with command evidence.

findingDetails.title: Seeded-PPR trace output loses the multi-hop provenance chain
findingDetails.scopeProof: Read .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/lib/graph/bfs-traversal.ts:19 and confirmed WeightedWalkResult has nodeId/minHop/maxWalkScore only; read recovered PPR tests and found multi-hop ranking coverage but no includeTrace assertion.

findingDetails.title: Checklist completion evidence conflicts with the packet's own task state
findingDetails.scopeProof: Compared checklist completion rows to tasks.md unchecked T008/T010/T011 and plan.md unchecked validate item; replayed validate.sh --strict, npm run typecheck, and targeted PPR vitest commands to separate runnable command evidence from stale packet state.

spec_code.notes: Seeded-PPR impact path remains gated and targeted tests pass, but includeTrace provenance is incomplete for multi-hop PPR candidates.

checklist_evidence.notes: Runnable commands pass, but checklist completion totals conflict with tasks.md and plan.md unchecked completion items.
